# Fantastic-admin

> 杰出的管理系统框架

开箱即用，提供舒适开发体验

## Table of Contents

- [FaCarousel 轮播图组件](/components/FaCarousel.md)

- [FaFlipCard 翻转卡片](/components/FaFlipCard.md)

- [FaGradientButton 渐变按钮](/components/FaGradientButton.md)

- [FaLabel 标签组件](/components/FaLabel.md)
- [FaLayoutContainer 布局容器组件](/components/FaLayoutContainer.md)
- [FaLinkPreview 链接预览](/components/FaLinkPreview.md)

- [FaMarquee 滚动横幅](/components/FaMarquee.md)

- [FaModal 对话框组件](/components/FaModal.md)
- [FaMultiStepLoader 多步骤加载器](/components/FaMultiStepLoader.md)
- [FaNumberField 数字输入框](/components/FaNumberField.md)

- [FaScrollingText 滚动文字组件](/components/FaScrollingText.md)

- [FaSelect 选择器组件](/components/FaSelect.md)
- [FaSlider 滑块](/components/FaSlider.md)
- [FaSmoothSwipe 平滑滑动](/components/FaSmoothSwipe.md)
- [FaSparklesText 闪耀文字](/components/FaSparklesText.md)
- [FaSparkline 迷你图组件](/components/FaSparkline.md)
- [FaSpotlightCard 聚光灯卡片](/components/FaSpotlightCard.md)
